title: Project Structure
description: Examine the main.dart file and identify the entry point of a Flutter app.
problemStatement:
Welcome to Flutter! Every Flutter app starts with a specific function. Identify the code that launches the app and print `"Flutter is ready!"` to the console using Dart's debugger.

**Requirement:** In your `main()` function, add a `print` statement before `runApp()`.
hints: The entry point is always `void main() { ... }`.
Use `print('Your Message');` to log to the console.
